item.title: Introducing the Health Dashboard
item.description: Why This Exists I’ve been tracking macros and glucose readings for a while now, but it’s always been scattered — a photo here, a reading there, data spread across apps with no single picture. So I built something to fix that. This section of the site is an automated health dashboard. Every week, my data gets pulled together, formatted into a report, and published here. No manual effort once it’s running.
